Defendants Rashaan Everett, Good Tree Holdings, Llc, And Laura Waltons Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Elizabeth L. Hurwitz; Ad Astra Law Group, LLP; 415-795-3579; appearing on behalf of defendants Rashaan Everett, Good Tree Holdings, LLC and Laura Walton.
Michael C. Miller; 650-323-2003; appearing on behalf of plaintiff 2440 Bldg, LLC.
Rashaan Everett, Laura Walton and Patrick Walters in attendance.

The court sustains plaintiff's objection to defendants' untimely reply. The court asks counsel for both sides if they wish to add anything that is not already in the papers. Both sides state that they submit on the papers. The court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS RASHAAN EVERETT, LAURA WALTON AND GOOD TREE HOLDINGS LLC'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is taken under submission.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2021 Continued To Mar-17-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Michael Miller, Esq., 650-323-2003, appearing for 2440 BLDG, Plaintiff
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. The Court stated that a right to attach was filed 3 times, which requires a bond to be filed 3 times and why wasnt't judgment asked for instead. Mr. Miller stated that he expected defendants to file an answer and that he understands that multiple bonds need to be posted. Counsel is instructed to email a proposed order to the staff attorney and read aloud the email address in open court.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF 2440 BLDG LLC Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is granted. The order must include that the Court will require a higher bond. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
